meta.title: SourceBox Sentry OG Card
meta.usage_context: Open Graph / Twitter card image for social sharing — final crop is 1200x630

physical_properties.shape: compact black USB webcam, generic shape, no logos, small green LED indicator dot illuminated

midground.notes: Compact black USB webcam, side three-quarter view, in macro focus. Plastic and lens detail visible. The green LED indicator on the front is the brightest point in the frame — small but unmistakably illuminated. NO logos, NO text on the camera body.

background.notes: Dark out-of-focus environment suggesting a glowing dashboard / computer screen behind the camera. Soft bokeh circles in green (#22c55e) and purple (#a855f7) brand colors floating at varying depths. Strong vignetting toward corners. Deep teal-black base (#0a0a0f to #003b47 gradient).

background.color: deep teal-black gradient with green and purple bokeh accents

atmosphere.mood: premium, moody, cinematic, eye-catching at thumbnail size

lighting.notes: Moody key light from back-left edge, just enough to define the camera silhouette. Brightest point in image is the small green LED on the camera front. Subtle purple-tinted rim from the right side. Background bokeh provides ~30% of total scene illumination via colored orbs.

controls.leave_negative_space: right_third — keep that area lower contrast for potential text overlay
controls.notes: Photorealistic close-up. Generate at 16:9 aspect ratio; final delivery is center-cropped to 1200x630 for OG/Twitter cards. Should read instantly at thumbnail size as 'tech, private, dark, branded green-purple'. Subject (camera) sits left of center.
